description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:unstable Docker image. Define a global before_script that runs `apt update -qq` and installs `texlive texlive-pstricks texlive-latex-recommended texlive-fonts-extra cm-super make` via `apt-get -y install`. Add a single stage called build with a job named build-distcheck that runs the commands `make`, `mkdir pdfs`, and `mv *.pdf pdfs`, then publishes the `pdfs/*` directory as an artifact. No services, caches, or conditional rules are defined, and the job runs on every pipeline execution.
